$description: Citron motion v2 — fast, smooth, physical, with a signature. Motion behaves like light responding to touch: instant attack, long graceful decay. No bounce, no overshoot in UI; reserved springs for brand moments only.

duration.$description: Animation durations — snappy interaction register plus a choreography register for reveals

fast.$description: Micro-interactions, hovers — fast enough to feel physical

cinematic.$description: Brand-moment reveals — hero entrances, specimen choreography. Never for interaction feedback.

stagger.$description: Per-item offset for staggered list/grid entrances. Cap total stagger at 400ms.

easing.$description: Easing curves — the Citron motion signature: fast attack, long luminous decay

in.$description: Ease in — for exits, things leaving

out.$description: Ease out — for entrances, things arriving

inOut.$description: Ease in-out — for position changes, transforms

expressive.$description: Expressive ease-out — smooth, confident arrival. Replaces bounce.

signature.$description: The Citron curve — near-instant attack, very long decay. Reveals, hero entrances, anything that should feel like light blooming. The brand's motion fingerprint.

swift.$description: Swift in-out — assertive position changes, shared-element moves, tab indicator slides

spring.$description: Spring presets for JS animation libraries (Framer Motion / Motion One format: stiffness, damping, mass). CSS fallback: use easing.signature.

responsive.$description: Interaction feedback — toggles, drags, snappy and critically damped

gentle.$description: Panels, sheets, popovers — settled and calm

bloom.$description: Brand moments — mascot, hero elements. The only spring allowed a hint of overshoot.
